debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
C : Category α
D : Category β
F G : Functor α β
η : @CategoryInContext.NaturalTransformation α β C D F G
h : @CategoryInContext.IsNatIso α β C D F G η
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
⊢ comp
      (have this := @h X;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)
      (Functor.homF f) =
    comp (Functor.homF f)
      (have this := @h Y;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)

failed_attempts:
have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    cases' Classical.choose_spec hx with _ hx_inv
    cases' Classical.choose_spec hy with _ hy_inv
    simp_all [← comp_assoc, ← comp_assoc]
    erw [← comp_assoc, η.naturality, comp_assoc]
    simp_all

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    cases' Classical.choose_spec hx with invx _; cases' Classical.choose_spec hy with invy _
    simp only [← invx, ← invy]
    have := η.naturality f
    apply_fun (fun g => invx ≫ g ≫ invy) at this
    simp only [assoc, invx.right, invy.left, id_comp, comp_id] at this
    exact this

have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    obtain ⟨fX, hfX⟩ := Classical.choose_spec hX
    obtain ⟨fY, hfY⟩ := Classical.choose_spec hY
    simp only [← hfX.inv_hom, ← hfY.inv_hom]
    rw [← Category.eq_inv_comp, ← Category.eq_comp_inv]
    simp only [NaturalTransformation.naturality η, comp_assoc]

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    cases' Classical.choose_spec hx with invx _; cases' Classical.choose_spec hy with invy _
    simp only [← invx, ← invy]
    have := η.naturality f
    apply_fun (fun g => invx ≫ g ≫ invy) at this
    simp only [assoc, invx.right, invy.left, id_comp, comp_id] at this
    exact this

have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    obtain ⟨fX, hfX⟩ := Classical.choose_spec hX
    obtain ⟨fY, hfY⟩ := Classical.choose_spec hY
    simp only [← hfX.left_inv, ← hfY.left_inv]
    simp only [← comp_assoc, ← comp_assoc]
    rw [← η.naturality f]
    simp only [hfX.right_inv, hfY.right_inv, comp_id, id_comp]

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    cases' Classical.choose_spec hx with _ hx_inv
    cases' Classical.choose_spec hy with _ hy_inv
    simp only [← hx_inv, ← hy_inv, ← η.naturality]
    simp [Category.comp_assoc]

have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    obtain ⟨fX, hfX⟩ := Classical.choose_spec hX
    obtain ⟨fY, hfY⟩ := Classical.choose_spec hY
    simp only [← hfX.left_inv, ← hfY.left_inv]
    rw [← Category.eq_inv_comp, ← Category.eq_comp_inv]
    simp only [NaturalTransformation.naturality η, comp_assoc]

have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    cases' Classical.choose_spec hX with invX hX
    cases' Classical.choose_spec hY with invY hY
    simp only [← hX.1, ← hY.1, ← Functor.id_homF, ← Category.id_comp, ← Category.comp_id]
    rw [← Category.assoc, ← η.naturality, Category.assoc, hX.2, Category.id_comp, Category.comp_id]

have hX : IsIso (η.arrow X) := h X
    have hY : IsIso (η.arrow Y) := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    cases' hX with g hg
    cases' hY with h' hh
    simp_all only [Iso.inv_comp_eq, eq_comp_inv]
    rw [← hg.1, ← hh.1, ← Functor.homF_id, ← η.naturality]
    simp [hg.1, hh.1]

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    cases' Classical.choose_spec hx with _ hx'
    cases' Classical.choose_spec hy with _ hy'
    simp_all [NaturalTransformation.naturality, ← comp_assoc, hx'.inv_comp_eq, hy'.comp_inv_eq]

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y

    cases' Classical.choose_spec hx with _ hx'
    cases' Classical.choose_spec hy with _ hy'
    simp only [Category.comp, ← Functor.homF_map]
    have := η.naturality f
    rw [← cancel_right hx'.inv_hom, ← cancel_left hy'.hom_inv]
    simp [this, assoc]

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    cases' Classical.choose_spec hx with _ hx_inv
    cases' Classical.choose_spec hy with _ hy_inv

    cases' Classical.choose_spec hy with _ hy'
